6.4.2.3.5 GetViewShape
Function Usage
Obtains the ViewShape of an aclTensor. ViewShape indicates the logical shape of
an aclTensor.
Assume that the StorageShape and ViewShape of an aclTensor are as follows:
● If the StorageShape is [10, 20], the aclTensor is arranged in the memory
based on [10, 20].
● If the ViewShape is [2, 5, 20], the aclTensor can be considered as data with
the shape [2, 5, 20] for use.
Prototype
gert::Shape GetViewShape...

5.1.20.1 Floor
Function Description
Obtains the minimum integer value less than or equal to x, that is, rounding
towards negative infinity. Examples:
Floor(3.9) = 3.0
Floor(-3.9) = -4.0

● Pass the temporary space through the sharedTmpBuffer input parameter.
